synopsis:
The captive Ewok Wicket Wystri Warrick reluctantly leads Imperial General Tern Koyatta's team through the forests of Endor in search of an abandoned weapons cache. Along the way Wicket strikes up a conversation in Ewokese with the bodiless RA-7 protocol droid E-X77, who confesses that he and his Dowutin companion Koll Orvenk regret the cruelty of their situation under Koyatta.

The caravan reaches the Endless Lake, where the flooded ruins of Endless Lake Village lie. Ignoring Wicket's warnings, Koyatta forces the group to cross on a makeshift boat. King Orcon and the Queen Serpent burst from the water, scattering the party, and only quick action saves them from the lake's deadly fauna. Meanwhile, back at Bright Tree Village, Chief Chirpa sends Asha Fahn and Meedro on a rescue mission; the two cross the lake on the back of Asha's tamed condor dragon.

Koyatta's group presses on and finds the cache, only to discover its enormous door already opened. A menacing roar answers their confusion: the Great Devourer, a towering Gorax, emerges from the cave ready to attack.
title: Ewoks (2024) #3
